name: Typeform
description: Access Typeform forms and read survey responses. Analyze form submissions and fetch response data for reporting and analysis.

auth.hint: Create a Personal Token in Typeform → Account → Personal Tokens.

tools.name: list_forms
tools.description: List all Typeform forms in your account with their title and response count.

tools.name: get_form
tools.description: Get the structure of a Typeform form including all questions and their types.

params.name: form_id
params.description: Form ID from the Typeform URL

tools.name: get_responses
tools.description: Get survey responses for a form with all answer values and submission metadata.

params.name: since
params.description: ISO date — return responses submitted after this date

params.name: until
params.description: ISO date — return responses submitted before this date
